analyst_note: Source is the CSRD sustainability statement within Orion's financial-statement documents. SBTi-approved 70%-by-2030 target, explicit 2023 baseline, full scope coverage, limited assurance. One MED (assurance level).

specificity.quote: Orion has committed to reach net-zero emissions by 2050
specificity.reasoning: Defined net-zero commitment; the report candidly acknowledges the challenges of achieving it.

metric.quote: target to reduce its absolute Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 70% by 2030 from a 2023 baseline

target.quote: target has been approved by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi)

time_horizon.quote: absolute Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 70% by 2030

scope.quote: E1-6 Gross Scopes 1, 2, 3 and Total GHG emissions
scope.reasoning: Scopes 1, 2 and 3 reported; a Scope 3 supplier-engagement goal is set.

verification.quote: The sustainability statement is subject to limited assurance by a sustainability reporting assurance provider
verification.reasoning: Externally assured, but to a limited assurance level.

consistency.quote: Orion does not disclose additional details of its climate transition plan, including division specific [plans], beyond what is reported under E1-1
consistency.reasoning: Transition plan reported under ESRS E1-1 and capex disclosed; the report candidly notes limited transition-plan granularity — a disclosed limitation rather than a contradiction.
